creator: hselasky@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

Yes, probably the IR parts needs to be attached for the probe to succeed. You could just edit the code and comment out the IR remove. Just search for the error prints you got in the code.

Or submit a patch for webcamd to do this. 


Look inside webcamd.c . Here are the calls for cuse to create all character devices.

--HPS
